summary: Tested Email Newsletter System for Syrian E-commerce App. All 17 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend Newsletter Footer component tested successfully - subscription flow works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: NewsletterSubscribe.js - Added missing data-testid attributes for better testability: newsletter-footer-form, newsletter-footer-email-input, newsletter-footer-subscribe-btn, newsletter-footer-success
Newsletter APIs properly validate email format using Pydantic EmailStr
Unsubscribe API returns 404 for non-existent emails (correct behavior)
Resubscribe flow correctly reactivates previously unsubscribed emails
Admin-only APIs (stats, templates, create) properly check user_type for authorization
seed_data_creation: Test emails created during testing with pattern TEST_newsletter_*, TEST_workflow_*, playwright_test_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter system fully tested. 7 APIs tested: (1) POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - public subscription, (2) POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe - public unsubscribe, (3) GET /api/newsletter/status - check subscription status, (4) GET /api/newsletter/stats - admin stats, (5) GET /api/newsletter/templates/list - 4 templates (welcome, sale, new_products, coupon), (6) POST /api/newsletter/create - create newsletter. Frontend NewsletterFooter component in HomePage works correctly. MOCKED: POST /api/newsletter/{id}/send - logs to DB without sending actual emails.

subscribe_api.details: Accepts email (required), name/phone (optional). Returns subscriber_id on success, already_subscribed flag if duplicate

unsubscribe_api.details: Sets is_active=false. Returns 404 if email not found

stats_api_admin.details: Returns total_subscribers, active_subscribers, total_newsletters, sent_newsletters, new_subscribers_week, growth_rate

templates_api.details: Returns 4 templates: welcome, sale, new_products, coupon - each with id, name, subject, content, preview_text

create_newsletter_api.details: Creates newsletter with subject, content, preview_text, target_audience. Returns newsletter_id

frontend_newsletter_footer.details: Email input + Subscribe button. Shows success message on subscription. Toast notification appears. Dark gray gradient background with orange button.

mocked_apis.POST /api/newsletter/{id}/send: MOCKED - Logs send records to newsletter_sends collection without sending actual emails
